name: Greek Lemon Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine broth, lemon juice, carrot, onion, celery, soup base, and pepper in a Dutch oven. Bring to boil over high heat.
2. Reduce heat, cover partially, and simmer until tender, about 20 minutes.
3. In a shallow bowl, blend butter and flour until smooth.
4. Using the back of a fork, scrape the butter mixture into the hot soup a little at a time, stirring well after each addition. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Meanwhile, beat yolks in a large bowl of electric mixer on high speed until light and lemon-colored. Reduce speed and gradually mix in some of the hot soup. Return the mixture to the saucepan and cook until heated through.
6. Stir in rice and chicken. Ladle soup into bowls.
7. Garnish with lemon slices.
